title: eremocitrus glauca
intro: Eremocitrus glauca, also known as the desert ash or desert lemon, is a small tree or shrub native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eremocitrus glauca include its potential use in treating respiratory issues and wounds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Eremocitrus glauca may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
